name: Hugues Bomokin
title: IT Professional & Solution Builder
shortBio: I design IT systems the way an engineer should: understand the problem, find the simplest path, then automate it so it scales without me. 10+ years of telecom infrastructure taught me how systems work, and how they fail. Technology doesn't stand still and neither do I: right now that means mastering how AI fits into real IT operations.
longBio: With 10+ years in network and IT operations, I've moved from keeping infrastructure running to designing the systems that run it. I build the tooling, automation, and workflow pipelines that make IT environments faster and more reliable, and I leverage AI to design and accelerate that work using development, automation, and AI as the means to solve real operational problems, not as ends in themselves. Based in Ottawa, bilingual (FR/EN), and open to new opportunities.
